subcodes.first_line: Verily, God maketh mention of His handmaiden from among His handmaidens, that she may be seized by the rapture of His verses and drawn nigh unto God, the Manifestor of clear proofs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الله یذکر امه من امائه لیاخذها جذب الایات و یقربها الی الله مظهر البینات
